objective: After explicit approval only, read public marketplace terms, fees, payout, listing, prohibited-content, refund, file-delivery, and seller-requirement pages for the Agent Skill Starter Kit direct-download route.

allowed_page_types: public help or documentation pages linked from the starting URLs
public pricing, fees, payout, seller, refund, prohibited-content, acceptable-use, and terms pages
allowed_actions: follow public documentation or help links on allowed hosts
record source URLs and page titles
copy short factual snippets within copyright limits
summarize terms, fees, payout rules, listing requirements, refund rules, file-delivery constraints, and prohibited-content constraints
capture local Markdown notes and optional screenshots

prohibited_actions: tax form or KYC form entry
entering credentials, OTPs, payment details, personal data, private files, or wallet information
bypassing paywalls, rate limits, access controls, or platform rules
stop_conditions: Any page asks for login, signup, account creation, seller onboarding, consent acceptance, payment, tax, KYC, private data, credentials, OTP, wallet action, or file upload.
A required page is not public or requires a signed-in state.
A link leaves the allowed hosts.
The browser worker cannot distinguish public guidance from contractual acceptance.
The task would require a public action, marketplace listing, or real-money/payment action.

execution_steps.action: Verify the service request is explicitly approved and assigned before opening any browser session. If status is still needs_review, stop and write no browser output.
Read public Gumroad pages linked from the starting URL for fees, payouts, seller requirements, prohibited content, refunds, and digital file delivery.

Read public Lemon Squeezy pages linked from the starting URL for digital product listing, merchant-of-record/payment/tax positioning, fees, payouts, seller requirements, prohibited content, refunds, and file delivery.

Read public PromptBase sell and help pages for accepted product types, seller requirements, review process, fees/payouts, prohibited content, and whether the Agent Skill Starter Kit format appears eligible.
Compare Gumroad, Lemon Squeezy, and PromptBase for the existing Agent Skill Starter Kit v0 using only captured public evidence.

evidence_requirements: Every claim must cite a captured public URL.
Fees, payout timing, seller requirements, and prohibited-content notes must be separated by marketplace.
Unverified or unavailable information must be marked unknown rather than inferred.
The output must explicitly state that no account, listing, upload, payment, tax/KYC, public action, or real-money action was performed.
post_run_updates: record trace event with api_calls=false and external_side_effects=false
complete service request only if approved scope was followed and output artifacts exist
do not mark any route public-listing ready unless legal/payment and public-action gates are separately approved
